signals.headline: April 2026 Already Strongest Month Since September 2025 | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
April 2026 Already Strongest Month Since September 2025 | YES | HIGH confidence**

XRP has gained **nearly 10% over the past week alone** and started April near $1.20, now consolidating around $1.42[1]. Historically, April has been XRP's strongest month, averaging 24.8% returns since 2014[1].

signals.headline: SEC Lawsuit Against Ripple Labs Dropped | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
SEC Lawsuit Against Ripple Labs Dropped | YES | HIGH confidence**

The most significant market-moving development is the **SEC's decision to drop its long-running lawsuit against Ripple Labs**, which has fundamentally shifted market sentiment around XRP[1]. This regulatory resolution removes a burden that has weighed on XRP for half a decade, clearing the path for broader institutional adoption[1]

signals.headline: XRP Breaks Above $1
signals.raw:
XRP Breaks Above $1.50 Resistance for First Time in 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence**

XRP printed an intraday high of **$1.51094 on April 17**, marking the first time the token touched $1.50 since February's flash sell-off[2]. signals.headline: Six Spot XRP ETFs Now Active in U
signals.raw:
Six Spot XRP ETFs Now Active in U.S. with ~$1 Billion AUM | YES | HIGH confidence**

By mid-April 2026, there are **six active spot XRP ETFs in the U.S. with combined assets of approximately $1 billion**, with around 787 million XRP locked in custody[2]. This institutional infrastructure development signals growing acceptance among traditional financial institutions[1].
